summary: Sprint 3 full testing: HR Reports (attendance/overtime/payroll/turnover tabs), Payroll Attendance Validation panel (Sprint 3.3), Low Stock Materials with configurable threshold (Sprint 3.4). All backend APIs pass. Frontend flows working correctly.

minor.issue: hr@garment.com user not seeded in DB — only admin@garment.com exists. Seed data should include hr user per test_credentials.md

ui_bugs.issue: Attendance tab 'Trend Kehadiran Harian' chart area is blank (chart does not render visually despite data loading)
Console shows 404 errors on page load (2 resources returning 404), but report data still loads

issues: Chart section renders empty white/grey area — Recharts or chart library may not be rendering

action_items: Seed hr@garment.com / Hr@123 user in DB with staff_hr role
Investigate why HR Reports attendance tab chart (Trend Kehadiran Harian) does not render visually
Fix the 2 console 404 errors on HR Reports page load
critical_code_review_comments: hr@garment.com user in test_credentials.md is not seeded — only admin@garment.com exists in rahaza users collection
RahazaHRReportsModule has a hydration warning: <span> inside <option> is invalid HTML — this may cause rendering issues in some browsers

success_rate.backend: 93% (13/15 tests pass, 2 skipped due to missing hr user seed)
success_rate.frontend: 90% (all core flows working, chart rendering issue in HR Reports)

test_credentials: admin@garment.com / Admin@123 (superadmin) works. hr@garment.com / Hr@123 NOT seeded.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created by testing agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 3 features tested: (1) HR Reports module loads with 4 tabs (Kehadiran/Overtime/Payroll/Turnover) — data loads correctly but charts don't render visually. (2) Payroll Run 'Run Baru' modal opens with Sprint 3.3 VALIDASI ATTENDANCE panel — 'Periksa Sekarang' button works and shows per-employee warnings. (3) Master Material Sprint 3.4 — search/low-stock filter works, Material Baru form shows 'KONFIGURASI AMBANG LOW STOCK' section with min-qty/min-pct fields. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_sprint3.py. hr user not seeded.
